results.title: Fit Check: Bad Bunny Steals the Show in Custom Schiaparelli Haute Couture at Paris Fashion Week
results.description: Summary Grammy-winning superstar Bad Bunny made a massive style statement at the Schiaparelli Haute Couture Fall-Winter 2026/27 show in ParisThe eye-catching custom look featured a butter-yellow suit embellished with unique brand details, including bespoke brooches that paid homage to his past albumsThe outfit was anchored by a glossy mock croc cowboy belt, a striking gold braided tie, and custom black leather cowboy boots When Benito steps out, the fashion world pays attention. Taking a quick detour from his sold-out global tour, the Grammy-winning Puerto Rican icon descended upon Paris on Monday, July 6, to sit front row at the Schiaparelli Haute Couture Fall/Winter 2027 show. Wearing a custom masterpiece crafted by creative director Daniel Roseberry, Bad Bunny turned heads and proved once again why he is one of the most exciting celebrity style icons pushing the boundaries of modern menswear.The look was an absolute masterclass in balancing classic, relaxed tailoring with Schiaparelli's signature surrealist edge. Bad Bunny anchored the fit with a custom butter-yellow, double-breasted peak lapel suit crafted from wool and silk, paired perfectly with matching wide-legged trousers.But with Schiaparelli, the magic is always in the details. The eye-catching look was heavily embellished with unique brand details, including bespoke bijoux buttons and custom brooches that not only nodded to the House's legendary Keyhole and Eye motifs but also served as a direct, wearable homage to his own past albums. The house revealed that his look was "styled with a white silk shirt, gold threaded 'braid' tie, and a glossy black mock croc leather cowboy belt with the signature Anatomy buckle."He finished the highly structural ensemble with a pair of custom heeled black leather cowboy boots, adding a rugged Western contrast to the high-fashion Parisian tailoring, while accessorizing with his signature gold hoop earrings to complete the fit. Click here to view full gallery at Hypebeast
